# NestJS Doctor

> Diagnose and fix your NestJS code in one command. 40 built-in rules across security, performance, correctness, and architecture. Outputs a 0-100 score with actionable diagnostics. Zero config. Monorepo support.

## Quick Start

Run at your project root:

```bash
npx nestjs-doctor@latest .
```

Install as a devDependency for CI:

```bash
npm install -D nestjs-doctor
```

## CLI Options

```
Usage: nestjs-doctor [directory] [options]

  --verbose       Show file paths, line numbers, and source context per diagnostic
  --score         Output only the numeric score (for CI)
  --json          JSON output (for tooling)
  --report        Generate an interactive HTML report (--graph also works)
  --min-score <n> Minimum passing score (0-100). Exits with code 1 if below threshold
  --config <p>    Path to config file
  --init          Set up the /nestjs-doctor skill for AI coding agents
  -h, --help      Show help
```

Exit codes: 0 = pass, 1 = score below threshold, 2 = bad input.

## Configuration

Optional. Create `nestjs-doctor.config.json` in your project root:

```json
{
  "minScore": 75,
  "ignore": {
    "rules": ["architecture/no-orm-in-services"],
    "files": ["src/generated/**"]
  },
  "rules": {
    "architecture/no-barrel-export-internals": false
  },
  "categories": {
    "performance": false
  }
}
```

Also works as a `"nestjs-doctor"` key in `package.json`.

Options:
- `include` (string[]) ‚Äî Glob patterns to scan. Default: `["**/*.ts"]`
- `exclude` (string[]) ‚Äî Glob patterns to skip. Default includes node_modules, dist, build, coverage, test files, mocks, seeders
- `minScore` (number) ‚Äî Minimum passing score (0-100)
- `ignore.rules` (string[]) ‚Äî Rule IDs to suppress
- `ignore.files` (string[]) ‚Äî Glob patterns for files whose diagnostics are hidden
- `rules` (Record<string, boolean>) ‚Äî Enable/disable individual rules
- `categories` (Record<string, boolean>) ‚Äî Enable/disable entire categories (security, correctness, architecture, performance)

## Monorepo Support

Auto-detected using five strategies (first match wins): `nest-cli.json` monorepo mode, `pnpm-workspace.yaml`, `package.json` workspaces (npm/Yarn), `nx.json` (Nx), and `lerna.json` (standalone Lerna). Non-NestJS packages are filtered out automatically. Each sub-project is scanned independently and results are merged. Output includes a combined score and per-project breakdown.

## Scoring

Weighted by severity and category, normalized by file count.

Severity weights: error = 3.0, warning = 1.5, info = 0.5
Category multipliers: security = 1.5x, correctness = 1.3x, architecture = 1.0x, performance = 0.8x

Score labels: 90-100 = Excellent, 75-89 = Good, 50-74 = Fair, 25-49 = Poor, 0-24 = Critical

## Node.js API

```typescript
import { diagnose, diagnoseMonorepo } from "nestjs-doctor";

const result = await diagnose("./my-nestjs-app");
result.score;       // { value: 82, label: "Good" }
result.diagnostics; // Diagnostic[]
result.summary;     // { total, errors, warnings, info, byCategory }

const mono = await diagnoseMonorepo("./my-monorepo");
mono.isMonorepo;    // true
mono.subProjects;   // [{ name: "api", result }, ...]
mono.combined;      // Merged DiagnoseResult
```

## AI Coding Agents

Run `--init` to auto-detect installed agents and install the nestjs-doctor skill:

```bash
npx nestjs-doctor --init
```

Supported agents: Claude Code, Amp Code, Cursor, OpenCode, Windsurf, Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Codex. A project-level fallback is always written to `.agents/nestjs-doctor/`.

## Rules (40)

### Security (9)

- `no-hardcoded-secrets` (error) ‚Äî API keys, tokens, passwords in source code
- `no-eval` (error) ‚Äî eval() or new Function() usage
- `no-csrf-disabled` (error) ‚Äî Explicitly disabling CSRF protection
- `no-dangerous-redirects` (error) ‚Äî Redirects with user-controlled input
- `no-synchronize-in-production` (error) ‚Äî synchronize: true in TypeORM config
- `no-weak-crypto` (warning) ‚Äî createHash('md5') or createHash('sha1')
- `no-exposed-env-vars` (warning) ‚Äî Direct process.env in Injectable/Controller
- `no-exposed-stack-trace` (warning) ‚Äî error.stack exposed in responses
- `no-raw-entity-in-response` (warning) ‚Äî Returning ORM entities directly from controllers

### Correctness (14)

- `no-missing-injectable` (error) ‚Äî Provider with constructor deps missing @Injectable()
- `no-duplicate-routes` (error) ‚Äî Same method + path + version twice in a controller
- `no-missing-guard-method` (error) ‚Äî Guard class missing canActivate()
- `no-missing-pipe-method` (error) ‚Äî Pipe class missing transform()
- `no-missing-filter-catch` (error) ‚Äî @Catch() class missing catch()
- `no-missing-interceptor-method` (error) ‚Äî Interceptor class missing intercept()
- `require-inject-decorator` (error) ‚Äî Untyped constructor param without @Inject()
- `prefer-readonly-injection` (warning) ‚Äî Constructor DI params missing readonly
- `require-lifecycle-interface` (warning) ‚Äî Lifecycle method without corresponding interface
- `no-empty-handlers` (info) ‚Äî HTTP handler with empty body
- `no-async-without-await` (warning) ‚Äî Async function/method with no await
- `no-duplicate-module-metadata` (warning) ‚Äî Duplicate entries in @Module() arrays
- `no-missing-module-decorator` (warning) ‚Äî Class named *Module without @Module()
- `no-fire-and-forget-async` (warning) ‚Äî Async call without await in non-handler methods

### Architecture (10)

- `no-business-logic-in-controllers` (error) ‚Äî Loops, branches, data transforms in HTTP handlers
- `no-repository-in-controllers` (error) ‚Äî Repository injection in controllers
- `no-orm-in-controllers` (error) ‚Äî PrismaService/EntityManager/DataSource in controllers
- `no-circular-module-deps` (error) ‚Äî Cycles in @Module() import graph
- `no-manual-instantiation` (error) ‚Äî new SomeService() for injectable classes
- `no-orm-in-services` (info) ‚Äî Services using ORM directly instead of repositories
- `no-service-locator` (warning) ‚Äî ModuleRef.get()/resolve() hides dependencies
- `prefer-constructor-injection` (warning) ‚Äî @Inject() property injection
- `require-module-boundaries` (info) ‚Äî Deep imports into other modules' internals
- `no-barrel-export-internals` (info) ‚Äî Re-exporting repositories from barrel files

### Performance (7)

- `no-sync-io` (warning) ‚Äî readFileSync, writeFileSync, etc.
- `no-blocking-constructor` (warning) ‚Äî Loops in Injectable/Controller constructors
- `no-dynamic-require` (warning) ‚Äî require() with non-literal argument
- `no-unused-providers` (warning) ‚Äî Provider never injected and no self-activating decorators
- `no-request-scope-abuse` (warning) ‚Äî Scope.REQUEST creates new instance per request
- `no-unused-module-exports` (info) ‚Äî Module exports unused by importers
- `no-orphan-modules` (info) ‚Äî Module never imported by any other module

## Links

- Docs: https://www.nestjs.doctor/docs
- npm: https://npmjs.com/package/nestjs-doctor
- GitHub: https://github.com/RoloBits/nestjs-doctor
